raw.message:
Virtual 10,000,000 FREE Coins!
(Must be 18+ to play. No real money can be won)

hook.summary: High-energy slot machine spin with lightning effects and game logo.
hook.visual_action: The game logo appears followed by a rapid slot reel spin landing on multiple bonus symbols.

scene_flow: Intro sequence featuring the Spin It Grand Diamonds logo with lightning effects.
Gameplay footage showing reels spinning and landing on multiple bonus symbols.
Transition to the Hold & Spin Wheel Feature screen with fire and lightning visuals.
Jackpot counter rapidly increasing to over 13 billion as coins fly across the screen.
Final end card with the game logo and a Play Now call-to-action button.
on_screen_text: 18+. No real money or prizes can be won. Purchases / paid random items optional.
audience_proxy: Adults 25-55 who enjoy the high-energy visual and auditory feedback of social casino games.
